title: sorghum cernuum
intro: Sorghum cernuum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family, characterized by its tall, upright stems and feathery plumes. Traditionally, sorghum cernuum has been used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Sorghum cernuum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in tinctures and powder form.
